seoTitle: Mount Duneed vs Mount Eccles — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Duneed and Mount Eccles. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Duneed vs Mount Eccles: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Duneed and Mount Eccles.
heading: Mount Duneed vs Mount Eccles — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Duneed, Victoria and Mount Eccles, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Duneed has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Mount Eccles (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Duneed or Mount Eccles safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Duneed has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Mount Eccles scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Duneed scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Eccles scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Duneed or Mount Eccles?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Duneed has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
